subcodes.first_line: O true friend! It is said that man is the sign of the All-Merciful and the supreme dawning-place of the grace of the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار حقیقی گویند که انسان ایت رحمن و مطلع اعظم بخشایش حضرت یزدانست این
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @man's distinction from the animal
